engine_validation: First end-to-end claim -> Workflow tool -> record -> done run. Previously only the mutex was proven (README: 'Not yet run').

result.headline: Governance scaffolding day — problem register, docs index, and the first self-watching workflow (daily-review) stood up; all uncommitted.
result.notable: Digest detected a two-paths divergence (automated watchtower run vs hand-run review) and a stale census run record never moved to done/.
